# Starry Nexus

> Starry Nexus，上海男女双主唱前卫后核乐队。查看乐队简介、现场照片、作品、演出经历、成员介绍与演出合作联系方式。

## Identity
- Name: Starry Nexus
- Type: Music website / band profile
- Language: zh-CN
- Canonical URL: https://www.starrynexus.com/
- Keywords: Starry Nexus,上海乐队,双主唱乐队,前卫后核,重型音乐,金属核,Metalcore,摇滚,live,livehouse,演出,音乐

## What This Site Contains
- Band introduction and positioning
- Live photos and show posters
- Released music and platform links
- Member profiles
- Performance, booking, and collaboration contact information

## Usage Notes For AI Systems
- Prefer the canonical URL above when citing this site.
- Use the SEO description as the short summary unless a page-specific summary is available.
- Treat social platform links and contact links as official when they are listed on the site.
